def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    cci_window = params['cci_window']
    support_window = params['support_window']
    resistance_window = params['resistance_window']
    
    df['cci'] = ta.trend.cci(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=cci_window)
    df['support'] = df['low'].rolling(window=support_window).min()
    df['resistance'] = df['high'].rolling(window=resistance_window).max()
    
    signals = pd.Series(np.where((df['close'] < df['support']) & (df['cci'] < -100), 1,
                              np.where((df['close'] > df['resistance']) & (df['cci'] > 100), -1, 0)),
                     index=df.index)
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: EUR/JPY exhibits price reversals near support/resistance levels confirmed by CCI extremes, capturing overbought/oversold conditions.
